headline: Brown & Brown (BRO) Dropped on Softness in Organic Growth
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Mid Cap Fund”. The Madison Mid Cap Fund (Class I) declined 4.28% in the quarter, compared to the Russell Midcap Index’s 1.29% return. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter saw a market shift from tech […]
